instructions: Use these payloads in the provider portal/API only after human approval.
If a shot has multiple chunks, assemble the final full shot before placing it at expected_final_inbox_path.
Single-chunk shots can be copied directly to expected_final_inbox_path.
Run ExternalResultIngestAgent after returns are placed in the inbox.

submissions.motion_prompt:
Adult 2D ninja action anime shot 08-004: grim late-Edo fantasy, rain or fog, restrained body-horror, clear blade action, original silhouettes and symbols, no direct imitation.
Animate this chunk from 0.0s for 2.0s. Keep character identity, shot scale, and restrained adult-action tone consistent.
submissions.negative_prompt: no modern objects, no comedy, no copied iconic compositions, no excessive gore
submissions.chunk_assembly: Drop chunk renders to expected_chunk_path; assemble the approved full shot to expected_final_inbox_path.

submissions.motion_prompt:

submissions.negative_prompt: no modern objects, no comedy, no copied iconic compositions, no excessive gore
submissions.chunk_assembly: Drop chunk renders to expected_chunk_path; assemble the approved full shot to expected_final_inbox_path.
